name: Radicchio Garden Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the frozen artichoke hearts according to package directions, rinse in cold water, and drain well.
2. In a bowl, combine the cooked artichoke hearts with olive oil and lemon juice. Mix well and allow to marinate for 15 minutes.
3. Add the remaining ingredients (radicchio, basil leaves, and parmesan cheese) to the bowl. Toss to mix well.
4. Serve at room temperature.
